Off Calendar Jan-06-2025 Continued To Feb-10-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Dec-06-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Apr-27-2022 is admitted to probate. Richard Nodine is appointed Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Shirley Yawitz is appointed probate Referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Jan-06-2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.
